concept: Conjure an arcade game where the player controls magnetic fields to navigate metallic objects through increasingly complex industrial environments. Different metals respond uniquely to magnetic influence - ferrous materials follow attraction/repulsion principles, while conductive metals generate their own fields when moved through existing ones, creating cascade effects. Environmental hazards include electromagnetic pulses that temporarily disable your magnetic control and superconductive surfaces that trap magnetic flux. Advanced techniques involve creating localized magnetic vortices that can temporarily maintain autonomous movement patterns without direct player control. The master challenge involves orchestrating a synchronized magnetic symphony that guides dozens of different metallic components simultaneously through a factory system to construct a revolutionary device.
